description: Masked password input — All interactive password prompts show * instead of plaintext characters as the user types

userStories.title: Shared masked password prompt utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single promptPassword utility so masking logic is written once and all commands benefit automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/prompt.ts exporting promptPassword(prompt?: string): Promise<string> with default prompt 'Password: '

Export promptPasswordWithConfirmation(prompt?: string, confirmPrompt?: string): Promise<string> with defaults 'Password: ' / 'Confirm password: '; calls process.exit(1) with 'Error: passwords do not match\n' on stderr when entries differ
Both functions use process.stdin.setRawMode(true) to intercept raw keystrokes; each printable character writes '*' to process.stderr and appends to buffer
Backspace (\u007f or \b): if buffer non-empty, pop last char and write '\b \b' to stderr
Enter (\r or \n): restore stdin (setRawMode(false), pause()), write newline to stderr, resolve with buffer string
Ctrl+C (\u0003): write newline to stderr and call process.exit(1)
Guard: only call process.stdin.setRawMode(true) when process.stdin.isTTY === true; if not TTY, fall back to readline rl.question for the prompt (no masking in non-interactive contexts)

Create src/utils/prompt.test.ts with unit tests: correct password returned when characters + Enter are simulated via data event; backspace removes last character; promptPasswordWithConfirmation resolves when both entries match; promptPasswordWithConfirmation calls process.exit(1) when entries differ
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Replace inline promptPassword in all command files
userStories.description: As a user, I want every command that asks for a password to mask my input so my password is never visible while I type.
acceptanceCriteria: src/commands/wallet/import.ts: remove local promptPassword and its readline createInterface import; import promptPassword from '../../utils/prompt.js'
src/commands/wallet/decrypt-keystore.ts: same replacement
src/commands/wallet/sign.ts: same replacement

src/commands/wallet/change-password.ts: remove local promptPassword; import promptPassword from '../../utils/prompt.js'; calls promptPassword('Current password: ') and promptPassword('New password: ') work unchanged since utility accepts a custom prompt string

src/commands/account/delete.ts: remove local promptPassword and its readline createInterface import used for passwords; import promptPassword from '../utils/prompt.js'; leave the existing rl.question for the non-password confirmation prompt untouched
src/commands/account/set.ts: remove local promptPassword and its readline createInterface import; import promptPassword from '../utils/prompt.js'
src/commands/payment.ts: remove local promptPassword and its readline createInterface import; import promptPassword from '../utils/prompt.js'
No command file retains a local promptPassword definition
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace promptPasswordWithConfirmation in wallet new and wallet new-mnemonic
userStories.description: As a user generating a new wallet with --save, I want my password masked during both entry and the confirmation prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: src/commands/wallet/new.ts: remove local promptPasswordWithConfirmation and its readline createInterface import; import promptPasswordWithConfirmation from '../../utils/prompt.js'
src/commands/wallet/new-mnemonic.ts: same replacement
No command file retains a local promptPasswordWithConfirmation definition
Existing E2E tests for wallet new and wallet new-mnemonic all pass
Typecheck passes
